query: Go to https://stripe.com/pricing and extract all the plan tiers, their monthly costs, transaction fees, and included features — I need this in a structured comparison table for our payment provider evaluation doc
Extract the full API reference from https://docs.anthropic.com/en/api/messages — I need all the request parameters, response fields, and code examples pulled into a local reference file

Scrape https://vercel.com/docs/functions/serverless-functions and pull out the configuration options, runtime limits, and environment variable handling — we need this for our deployment architecture doc
Extract the pricing comparison table from https://supabase.com/pricing — get all the tier names, database limits, bandwidth caps, and authentication quotas as structured data

I need to pull the complete list of supported languages and frameworks from https://sonarcloud.io/documentation/supported-languages/ — extract the language names, analysis types, and any version requirements
Go to https://bun.sh/docs/bundler and extract all the bundler configuration options with their types, defaults, and descriptions — save as a reference markdown file
Scrape https://platform.openai.com/docs/models and extract the model names, context windows, pricing per token, and capability descriptions into a comparison spreadsheet format
Extract the NVIDIA CUDA toolkit installation requirements from https://docs.nvidia.com/cuda/cuda-installation-guide-linux/ — need the supported OS versions, driver requirements, and disk space needs
Search for recent articles about the impact of AI on software development jobs and find 5-10 credible sources with URLs
Find the latest news about TypeScript 6.0 release date and new features
Write a comprehensive market analysis of the cloud infrastructure space comparing AWS, Azure, and GCP with growth projections and strategic recommendations
Create a deep research report on microservices architecture patterns with case studies from Netflix, Uber, and Spotify
Build a structured company profile for Cloudflare — return JSON with funding, valuation, headcount, key products, and competitive positioning
Refactor the API gateway middleware to support rate limiting per API key with Redis-backed counters
Set up a CI/CD pipeline with GitHub Actions for our monorepo — include build, test, lint, and deploy stages
